hero.description: I build high-converting websites for plumbers, HVAC companies, and electricians that turn online searches into booked jobs.

pain.label: The Problem
pain.headline:
YOUR COMPETITOR
IS GETTING THE CALL.
YOU'RE NOT.
pain.description: Every day someone in Saskatoon searches "plumber near me" or "HVAC repair" — and your competitor with a professional website gets the call. You don't.
pain.description2: A weak website (or no website) costs you thousands every month in missed jobs. I fix that — fast.

cards.title: Leads going to competitors
cards.body: 97% of people research local service companies online before calling.

cards.title: Ugly websites kill trust instantly
cards.body: You have under 8 seconds to make a first impression online.

cards.title: No site = no calls = no growth
cards.body: Relying on word-of-mouth alone is not a scalable strategy.

cards.title: Fixed in 3 days — guaranteed
cards.body: A professional site built for your trade, live in under a week.

services.label: What I Build
services.headline:
WEBSITES THAT WORK AS
HARD AS YOU DO

cards.title: Plumbing
cards.description: Emergency service pages, click-to-call, service area maps, and trust badges that get you hired over the big guys.

cards.title: HVAC
cards.description: Seasonal promo pages, maintenance plan upsells, booking forms, and financing info that fill your schedule year-round.

cards.title: Electrical
cards.description: License & insurance trust signals, panel upgrade pages, residential & commercial sections, and lead forms that convert.

everything_included.title: Everything Included
everything_included.description: Every site comes pre-built and ready to customize — no waiting months, no back-and-forth. Your business online in 3 days.

results.label: Why Web By Ethan
results.headline:
NOT JUST PRETTY.
BUILT TO CONVERT.
results.description: Big agencies build generic websites. I build conversion machines. Every element — from your headline to your contact form — is engineered to make someone pick up the phone and call your number.
results.description2: I'm Saskatoon-based and focused on local service companies. I know what makes a homeowner choose your business over a competitor.

promo_card.title: Built for Saskatoon Service Pros
promo_card.description: I specialize exclusively in trade & service businesses. I know exactly what your local customers need to see before they pick up the phone.

process.label: The Process
process.headline: ZERO TO LIVE IN 3 DAYS

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.description: Free 30-min call. I learn your business, customers, and goals.

steps.title: Design & Build
steps.description: Custom-coded site built in 3–5 days. No templates, no page builders.

steps.title: Review & Refine
steps.description: You review everything. Two rounds of revisions until it's perfect.

steps.title: Go Live & Grow
steps.description: Site goes live. I handle hosting, domain setup, and any tweaks you need after launch.

testimonials.label: Results
testimonials.headline: DON'T TAKE MY WORD FOR IT

items.quote: Ethan built us a new site and within the first month we got 12 new service calls from people who found us on Google. Paid for itself in the first week.
items.name: Mike D.

items.quote: Our old site was embarrassing. Ethan redesigned everything and our Google ranking jumped from page 4 to page 1 in under 2 months. The phone doesn't stop ringing.
items.name: Jason R.

items.quote: Fast, professional, and he actually knows the service industry. My electrician website was done in 3 days and looks better than any competitor. Worth every penny.
items.name: Tony S.

items.question: How long does it take to build my website?
items.answer: Most websites are done in 3–5 business days from when I have your info. Complex multi-page sites may take up to 7 days. I'll give you an exact timeline on our discovery call.

items.question: Do I need to provide content and photos?
items.answer: I write all the copy — just give me the basics about your business. For photos I use professional stock images, but real job photos always convert better if you have them.

items.question: Will my website show up on Google?
items.answer: Every site is built with clean structure, fast load times, and proper page titles — the basics that help search engines understand your business. Beyond that, showing up in Google takes time and more than just a website.

items.question: I already have a website — can you redesign it?
items.answer: Absolutely — redesigns are a big part of what I do. I'll take your brand and rebuild it from scratch into something that actually converts. Same process, same turnaround.

items.question: Who handles hosting and the domain?
items.answer: I handle all setup — hosting, domain connection, SSL certificate, speed optimization. You own everything. Hosting runs about $10–15/month direct to you, no markup from me.

items.question: What happens after the site launches?
items.answer: Once your site is live it's yours. I'm available for ongoing updates, changes, or additions on a paid basis — just email me and I'll get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Making Saskatoon businesses look better online. High-converting websites for local service companies.
